meta.project: West Edmonton Mall — Marketing Landing Site

product_overview: A Next.js marketing site that presents West Edmonton Mall's story, district highlights, attractions, events and leasing availability, with a fixed sidebar for quick navigation and in-page forms for retail and event inquiries.
core_goals: Allow visitors to learn the mall's scale, vision, and district offerings through cinematic storytelling sections.
Enable users to quickly jump between sections of the site via a persistent sidebar.
Let prospective tenants request a retail availability brief by submitting company and requirement details.
Let event organizers submit booking inquiries specifying organization, event type and expected attendance.
Provide lightweight interactive cues (hover states, scroll progress) that improve exploration and discovery.

features.name: Non-linear Sidebar Navigation
features.description: A fixed left sidebar that lets users navigate freely between the site's main sections while showing the active section.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click any sidebar nav item to navigate to /overview -> See active page link highlighted in gold with a left border
Navigate to /retail -> Click any sidebar nav item to navigate to /attractions -> See active page link highlighted in gold with a left border

features.name: Scroll Progress Indicator
features.description: A real-time progress bar at the top of the viewport that visually indicates how far the user has scrolled through the current page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll down the page -> Observe the gold progress bar filling from left to right at the top of the viewport

features.name: Request Availability Form (Home)
features.description: A form on the homepage where prospective tenants provide a company name and select a retail requirement to request an availability brief, with inline validation and a success state.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to the availability section -> Fill in company name with non-whitespace text -> Select requirement category from dropdown -> Submit the availability request -> Observe a loading spinner during submission -> See 'Request Received' success confirmation screen -> Click 'Submit Another' to reset the form

Navigate to / -> Scroll to the availability section -> Fill in company name with only whitespace -> Select requirement category from dropdown -> Submit the availability request -> See inline error indicating company name is required

features.name: Events Booking Inquiry Form
features.description: A booking inquiry form on the Events page where organizers provide their organization name, choose an event type, and indicate expected attendance to express interest in venue booking (UI-only submission).
user_flows: Navigate to /events -> Fill organization name with non-whitespace text -> Select event type from dropdown -> Select expected attendance range -> Submit the booking inquiry -> Observe the form's submission state (UI-only; no backend confirmation)

features.name: Landing Page Storytelling Sections
features.description: Cinematic hero video and sequential storytelling sections (stats, vision, districts) with interactive hovers and CTAs to communicate the mall's scale and design.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe hero area attempt to autoplay the YouTube background video or display a gradient fallback if autoplay is blocked
Navigate to / -> Scroll through the stats, vision, and districts sections -> Observe statistics and content appear as you scroll
Navigate to / -> Hover a district card -> Observe the district image brighten (opacity increases)
Navigate to / -> Hover the grayscale vision image -> Observe it transition to full color and slightly scale up
Navigate to / -> Hover the primary hero CTA -> Observe the CTA scale up on hover and scale down on active interaction

routes.description: Landing page — cinematic YouTube video hero, stats, districts, leasing availability form
Property overview — scale data, demographic reach, catchment map, Europa Boulevard
Retail districts — Europa Boulevard, luxury wing, brand collection bento grid
Attractions — World Waterpark, Galaxyland, Sea Life Caverns, partnership CTA
Events & Venue module — venue portfolio, event types, past highlights, booking inquiry form

features.name: Non-linear Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Fixed left sidebar allows user to freely jump between all 5 sections
user_interactions: Click any sidebar nav item to navigate to that page
Active page link is highlighted in gold with a left border

features.name: Scroll Progress Indicator
features.description: Real-time scroll progress bar at top of viewport updates as user scrolls
user_interactions: Scroll down the page and observe the gold progress bar filling from left to right

features.name: Request Availability Form (Home)
features.description: User inputs company name and retail requirement to request an availability brief
user_interactions: Fill company name input (required, whitespace rejected)
See inline error if company name is empty or whitespace-only

features.name: Events Booking Inquiry Form
features.description: User selects event type and attendance range to submit a booking inquiry

features.name: Landing Page Storytelling Sections
features.description: Cinematic sections scrolling through the mall story (Hero video, Stats, Vision, Districts, CTA)
user_interactions: Watch YouTube autoplay background video in hero
Scroll through stats, vision, districts sections
Hover district cards to see image brightening

known_limitations.issue: YouTube autoplay may be blocked by some browser policies
known_limitations.impact: Hero video falls back to gradient background; content is still readable

known_limitations.issue: Events booking form and attractions site visit form are UI-only (no backend)
known_limitations.impact: Forms show no confirmation on submit (only AvailabilityForm on / has full state)
